description: Software supply chain compromise via vulnerable dependencies and maintainer account takeover.

SC-01.label: target_reachable_and_responsive
SC-01.description: Target system or service responds to network probes; collection or exploitation is feasible.
SC-01.evidence_hint: TCP connect or ICMP probe confirms reachability; confirm via port scan or HTTP HEAD request

SC-02.label: target_service_exposed
SC-02.description: Target service is listening on a reachable port and accepting connections.
SC-02.evidence_hint: Service banner grab or HTTP 200/401 response confirms service is listening

SC-03.label: pyyaml_unsafe_deserialization_exploitable
SC-03.description: Deserialization of untrusted data enabling code execution (CVE-2017-18342, CVSS 9.8 CRITICAL)
SC-03.evidence_hint: Network-accessible service probe; confirm reachability via TCP connect or banner grab

SC-04.label: pyyaml_arbitrary_code_execution_possible
SC-04.description: A vulnerability was discovered in the PyYAML library in versions before 5.3.1, where it is susceptible to arbitrary code execution when it processes untrusted YAML files through the full_load method o (CVE-2020-1747, CVSS 9.8)
SC-04.evidence_hint: Network-accessible service probe; confirm reachability via TCP connect or banner grab

SC-05.label: paramiko_authentication_bypass_possible
SC-05.description: Authentication bypass via improper credential validation (CVE-2018-7750, CVSS 9.8 CRITICAL)
SC-05.evidence_hint: Network-accessible service probe; confirm reachability via TCP connect or banner grab

SC-06.label: cryptography_arbitrary_code_execution_possible
SC-06.description: Symantec LiveUpdate before 1.6 does not use cryptography to ensure the integrity of download files, which allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code via DNS spoofing of the update.symantec.com  (CVE-2001-1125, CVSS 9.8)
SC-06.evidence_hint: Network-accessible service probe; confirm reachability via TCP connect or banner grab

SC-07.label: pillow_critical_vuln_present
SC-07.description: libImaging/SgiRleDecode.c in Pillow before 6.2.2 has an SGI buffer overflow. (CVE-2020-5311, CVSS 9.8)
SC-07.evidence_hint: Network-accessible service probe; confirm reachability via TCP connect or banner grab

SC-08.label: paramiko_remote_code_execution_possible
SC-08.description: Paramiko version 2.4.1, 2.3.2, 2.2.3, 2.1.5, 2.0.8, 1.18.5, 1.17.6 contains a Incorrect Access Control vulnerability in SSH server that can result in RCE. (CVE-2018-1000805, CVSS 8.8)
SC-08.evidence_hint: Network-accessible service probe; confirm reachability via TCP connect or banner grab; requires low privilege user present

SC-09.label: pillow_integer_overflow_exploitable
SC-09.description: Integer overflow leading to memory corruption (CVE-2020-5310, CVSS 8.8 HIGH)
SC-09.evidence_hint: Network-accessible service probe; confirm reachability via TCP connect or banner grab; user interaction required (social engineering or phishing vector)

SC-10.label: cryptography_high_vuln_present
SC-10.description: Spectrum Cash Receipting System before 6.504 uses weak cryptography (static substitution) in the PASSFILE password file, which makes it easier for local users to gain privileges by decrypting a passwo (CVE-2005-4860, CVSS 7.8)
SC-10.evidence_hint: Local execution required; confirm via SSH command or agent collection; requires low privilege user present

SC-11.label: pillow_high_vuln_present
SC-11.description: An issue was discovered in Pillow before 6.2.0. (CVE-2019-16865, CVSS 7.5)
SC-11.evidence_hint: Network-accessible service probe; confirm reachability via TCP connect or banner grab

SC-12.label: pillow_out_of_bounds_read_exploitable
SC-12.description: Out-of-bounds read via malformed input (CVE-2020-5313, CVSS 7.1 HIGH)
SC-12.evidence_hint: Network-accessible service probe; confirm reachability via TCP connect or banner grab; user interaction required (social engineering or phishing vector)

supply_chain_network_exploit_v1.description: Remote exploitation via network-accessible vulnerability in supply_chain environment.

supply_chain_local_exploit_v1.description: Local exploitation of supply_chain environment requiring initial access.

supply_chain_full_chain_v1.description: Full exploitation chain: remote access through local privilege escalation in supply_chain.
